creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text: It is the same problem, only the versions of libarchive are different. The CFLAGS and LDFLAGS are wrong, if liblzma is installed. My solution is to cmment it out and add liblzma.so:archivers/lzmalib to LIB_DEPENDS. This works on 10.X and 11.0 but not on 9.3.
